ESP32 Drone
Home Tutorials Hardware Downloads
中文

Course Levels

Beginner: Flight Explorer Intermediate: Flight Engineer Advanced: Flight Scientist

Tutorials

Beginner Tutorials

项目 01：小飞侠诞生

组装无人机硬件，并烧录'一键起飞'固件，完成第一次飞行。

Level: beginner Duration: 1 小时

Project 01: Birth of a Little Flyer

Assemble drone hardware and flash 'one-key takeoff' firmware, complete first flight.

Level: beginner Duration: 1 hour

项目 02：个性小飞机

通过烧录不同的固件，给无人机更换起飞音效和 LED 灯效，打造专属个性飞机。

Level: beginner Duration: 45 分钟

Project 02: Customization

Modify the drone's takeoff sound effects, motor speed range, and LED lighting effects to understand the code structure.

Level: beginner Duration: 1 hour

项目 03：空中画家

使用路径规划工具，让无人机自动画出'8'字或心形，成为一个空中画家。

Level: beginner Duration: 1 小时

Project 03: Path Planning

Implement basic path planning algorithms to make the drone fly along a preset route.

Level: beginner Duration: 1.5 hours

项目 04：我的眼睛

给无人机安装摄像头，通过手机看到无人机的视角，体验第一人称飞行的乐趣。

Level: beginner Duration: 1 小时

Project 04: FPV Flight

Add a camera to the drone and implement First Person View (FPV) flight.

Level: beginner Duration: 2 hours

项目 05：跟屁虫

让无人机自动追踪红色小球，成为你的'跟屁虫'，体验更智能的飞行功能。

Level: beginner Duration: 1 小时

Project 05: Target Tracking

Use the camera to implement color target tracking, making the drone automatically follow a red ball.

Level: beginner Duration: 2 hours

项目 06：小队集合

用两架无人机组成小队，一起飞行，体验多机编队的乐趣。

Level: beginner Duration: 1 小时 30 分钟

Project 06: Formation Flight

Use ESP-NOW protocol to achieve simple formation flight between two drones.

Level: beginner Duration: 2.5 hours
